title: Crispy Italian Persian Cucumber Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy weeknight dish featuring crispy Persian cucumber slices with an herbal Italian twist, suitable for pescatarian diets.
instructions: Wash and slice the cucumber into thin rounds.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add garlic cloves and cook for another minute or two, being careful not to burn them.
Stir in the chopped thyme leaves and paprika powder, cooking for an additional minute.
Gently add cucumber rounds to the pan. Do not overcrowd; cook in batches if necessary.
Cook until the cucumbers are just tender but still crisp, about 5-7 minutes per batch.
Drain any excess oil from the cucumber slices and top with olives before serving.
